features: A light moisturising all over body lotion that acts as a protective barrier
Particulary suitable for infants and the elderly
Provides everyday relief for dry skin. Can be applied to affected areas as often as required
Comes in a 500 millilitre pump bottle. Also available in 250g
Dermatologically tested low irritant formula. Free from fragrance colour and other common irritants
description: Product Description QV Skin Lotion is a light, moisturising, all-over body lotion that helps to relieve and soothe dry skin. QV Skin Lotion acts as a protective barrier and helps seal in natural moisture for 24 hour hydration. It provides every day relief for dry skin. QV Skin Lotion's luxuriously light formulation is easy to apply to all parts of the body leaving your skin feeling soft and smooth. Ingredients Aqua (Water), Glycerin, Petrolatum, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Cetearyl Alcohol, Ceteareth-20, Steareth-2, Dimethicone, Glyceryl Stearate, Methylparaben, Propylparaben, Dichlorobenzyl Alcohol, Polyacrylic Acid, Triethanolamine. Directions Apply to affected areas as often as required, particularly after showering, bathing, shaving, exposure to harsh climatic conditions and at night. Safety Warning For external use only.Avoid direct contact with eyes. In case of eye contact, rinse immediately with water. Box Contains 1 x QV Skin Lotion 500ml See more
